zh.name: 彭斯诚
zh.introduction: 多年前端开发与架构经验，长期负责商业化、金融、SaaS/PaaS 场景下的复杂系统建设。擅长将前端工程能力与业务目标结合，推动复杂项目从 0 到 1 落地，通过平台化、标准化和数据化手段持续提升研发效率与业务价值。近期主导了 AI Agent 在前端物料平台的工程化落地。

en.name: Sicheng Peng
en.introduction: Nearly 10 years of frontend development and architecture experience across commercialization, fintech, and SaaS/PaaS domains. Core stack: React and TypeScript, with additional experience in Vue, Node.js, and NestJS. Led the architecture of large-scale frontend projects including an online PPT editor, low-code material platform, and Monorepo engineering systems. Skilled at aligning frontend engineering with business goals — driving complex projects from zero to one, and continuously improving R&D efficiency through platformization, standardization, and data-driven approaches. Recently led the engineering integration of AI Agents into the frontend material platform.
